description: Program-memory v3 adjudicated claim ledger for one program.

required_fields.name: claim_kind
required_fields.description: Claim family such as efficacy, safety, or exposure.

required_fields.name: evidence_scope
required_fields.description: Scope of the evidence supporting the claim.

required_fields.name: primary_source_document_id
required_fields.description: Primary source document anchoring the claim.

required_fields.name: extraction_confidence
required_fields.description: Confidence in the fidelity of extraction from the cited sources.

required_fields.name: source_reliability
required_fields.description: Reliability of the source mix supporting the claim.

required_fields.name: risk_of_bias
required_fields.description: Bias risk for the evidence supporting the claim.

required_fields.name: reporting_integrity_risk
required_fields.description: Risk that reporting artifacts or source discrepancies distort the claim.

required_fields.name: transportability_confidence
required_fields.description: Confidence that the claim transports beyond the exact studied context.

required_fields.name: interpretation_confidence
required_fields.description: Confidence in the adjudicated interpretation itself.

optional_fields.name: study_id
optional_fields.description: Study identifier when the claim is study-scoped.

optional_fields.name: supporting_source_document_ids
optional_fields.description: Delimited list of additional supporting source documents.
